The '''Cryospac-90 Boghopper''' was a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] used on [[Seikosha/Legends|Seikosha]]. It carried one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], six passengers, and 40 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of cargo. It was 7 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and could hover 7 meters off the ground. It cost from 2,000–5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], but could be rented on [[Seikosha/Legends|Seikosha]] for 10 credits per local day. The vehicle was unarmed, but at least one was modified with a heavy [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]].
